# GumLab

> European direct-to-consumer wellness gummies — three precisely-dosed functional formulas (PERFORM, CALM, SLEEP), third-party batch tested and delivered on a 28-day cycle.

GumLab makes serious, clinically-oriented gummy supplements. Every 28-gummy bag is assayed for potency, heavy metals and microbial content by an independent EU-accredited laboratory, and each batch's Certificate of Analysis is published on the product page.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, stack builder, batch verification, FAQ.

## Optional

- [Sign in](/auth): Customer account access.
